name: Stock Trends API Tools
service_description: Autonomous portfolio intelligence API for AI agents. Agent-native probabilistic market intelligence infrastructure: ST-IM (Stock Trends Inference Model) forward-return distributions, market regime analysis, sector breadth confirmation, leadership rotation analytics, STIM Select probabilistic stock lists, portfolio construction and evaluation, and symbol decision scoring across 4, 13, and 40-week investment horizons. Built for agentic research workflows using x402 and MPP payment rails. Outputs are processed, ranked, and interpretation-ready — not raw price data.

tools.name: ai_context
tools.title: AI Context
tools.description: Returns dataset structure, indicator definitions, coverage, usage guidance, and discovery links for agents. Use after /v1/ai/tools as the secondary explanatory entry point.

tools.name: ai_proof_market_edge
tools.title: Proof of Value — Market Edge
tools.description: Free, non-metered, no auth required. Returns a static synthetic demonstration of Stock Trends signal structure, value proposition, and field schemas. Use this before purchasing access to confirm field names, trend codes, and RSI baseline semantics. Instruments use impossible synthetic symbols — not real tickers.

tools.name: openapi_schema
tools.title: OpenAPI Schema
tools.description: Planning helper. Exact request contracts, parameter locations, response schemas, and auth headers for Stock Trends API v1.

tools.name: pricing_metadata
tools.title: Pricing Metadata
tools.description: Returns pricing discovery metadata: supported payment methods, endpoint families, and agent identity guidance. Public, no auth required.

tools.name: pricing_catalog
tools.title: Pricing Catalog
tools.description: Public planning infrastructure. Returns the live STC pricing rule catalog with concrete endpoint prices. Fetch at agent startup to build a local cost map before paid calls.

tools.name: cost_estimate
tools.title: Cost Estimate
tools.description: Returns deterministic STC cost estimates for a named workflow before execution. Public, free, and non-metered.

tools.name: workflows
tools.title: Workflow Registry
tools.description: Returns available multi-step workflows with live per-step STC costs resolved from the pricing engine. Public, no auth required.

tools.name: agents
tools.title: Agent Registry
tools.description: Lists agents registered for the authenticated customer.

tools.name: instrument_lookup
tools.title: Instrument Lookup
tools.description: Planning helper. Looks up a stock or ETF by symbol to retrieve exchange, type, and metadata before paid calls.

tools.name: instrument_resolve
tools.title: Instrument Resolve
tools.description: Planning helper. Resolves symbol_exchange or symbol plus exchange into one instrument before downstream paid intelligence calls.

tools.name: stwr_reports_catalog
tools.title: STWR Reports Catalog
tools.description: Planning helper. Lists valid Stock Trends Weekly Reporter report codes before paid report requests.

tools.name: meta_indicators
tools.title: Indicator Metadata
tools.description: Planning helper. Field definitions for trend, trend_cnt, mt_cnt, rsi, rsi_updn, and vol_tag.

tools.name: meta_stim
tools.title: ST-IM Metadata
tools.description: Planning helper. ST-IM field definitions, confidence-bound fields, and base-period mean returns.

tools.name: meta_stwr
tools.title: STWR Metadata
tools.description: Planning helper. Stock Trends Weekly Reporter report family metadata.

tools.name: agent_screener_top
tools.title: Agent Screener Top
tools.description: Returns top-ranked instruments from the latest Stock Trends signal data. Filters by trend code (default: bullish states ^+, ^-, v^), RSI threshold (relative performance vs S&P 500 benchmark, baseline 100), trend persistence (trend_cnt), and trend maturity (mt_cnt). Each result includes trend, trend_cnt, mt_cnt, rsi, rsi_updn, vol_tag, symbol_exchange. Recommended first premium call for agent workflows.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: indicators_latest
tools.title: Indicators Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest Stock Trends indicator snapshot for a symbol: trend state, trend_cnt, mt_cnt, rsi, rsi_updn, vol_tag, and related signal metadata. RSI baseline is 100. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

parameters.name: symbol_exchange
parameters.description: Stock Trends symbol plus exchange suffix. You may alternatively provide symbol and exchange.

tools.name: indicators_history
tools.title: Indicators History
tools.description: Returns historical weekly Stock Trends indicator rows for a symbol, including trend, trend_cnt, mt_cnt, rsi, rsi_updn, vol_tag, and related signal fields. Use for signal persistence and trend maturity review. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

parameters.name: symbol_exchange
parameters.description: Stock Trends symbol plus exchange suffix. You may alternatively provide symbol and exchange.

tools.name: prices_latest
tools.title: Prices Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest weekly price row for a symbol, including price, adjusted close, weekly high/low, volume, trades, and price change. Use as context alongside Stock Trends signals. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

parameters.name: symbol_exchange
parameters.description: Stock Trends symbol plus exchange suffix.

tools.name: prices_history
tools.title: Prices History
tools.description: Returns historical weekly price rows for a symbol with price, adjusted close, high/low, volume, trades, and price change. Use bounded limits for agent workflows. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

parameters.name: symbol_exchange
parameters.description: Stock Trends symbol plus exchange suffix.

tools.name: stim_latest
tools.title: STIM Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest ST-IM (Stock Trends Inference Model) forward return expectations and statistical distributions for a symbol. Covers 4, 13, and 40-week horizons. Fields: xNwk1 (lower CI bound), xNwk (mean), xNwk2 (upper CI bound), xNwksd (std deviation). Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

interpretation_dependency.reason: Base-period mean returns are required to interpret ST-IM means and probabilities correctly.

interpretation_rules: Call /v1/meta/stim before interpreting ST-IM results.
Raw x4wk/x13wk/x40wk means are estimated mean returns, not standalone bullish signals.
Do not interpret a positive raw mean as bullish unless it exceeds the relevant base mean or has adequate probability of exceeding it.
Use x4wksd/x13wksd/x40wksd to estimate probability of exceeding base-period means.
If is_stale=true or missing_reason is present, treat the ST-IM result as historical fallback and disclose that limitation.

stim_select_style_logic.prob13wk_minimum_description: 13-week probability of exceeding the base-period mean should be at least 55%.
stim_select_style_logic.lower_confidence_bounds: Emphasize lower confidence bounds relative to base-period means where applicable.

required_interpretation_steps: Compare x4wk, x13wk, and x40wk to base_period_mean_returns_pct.
Use x4wksd, x13wksd, and x40wksd to estimate probability of exceeding base means.
Disclose stale or fallback data when is_stale=true or missing_reason is present.

tools.name: stim_history
tools.title: STIM History
tools.description: Returns historical ST-IM (Stock Trends Inference Model) distribution records for a symbol across 4, 13, and 40-week horizons. Ordering depends on query scope; broad queries return most recent records first. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

interpretation_dependency.reason: Base-period mean returns are required to interpret ST-IM means and probabilities correctly.

interpretation_rules: Call /v1/meta/stim before interpreting ST-IM results.
Raw x4wk/x13wk/x40wk means are estimated mean returns, not standalone bullish signals.
Do not interpret a positive raw mean as bullish unless it exceeds the relevant base mean or has adequate probability of exceeding it.
Use x4wksd/x13wksd/x40wksd to estimate probability of exceeding base-period means.
If is_stale=true or missing_reason is present, treat the ST-IM result as historical fallback and disclose that limitation.

stim_select_style_logic.prob13wk_minimum_description: 13-week probability of exceeding the base-period mean should be at least 55%.
stim_select_style_logic.lower_confidence_bounds: Emphasize lower confidence bounds relative to base-period means where applicable.

required_interpretation_steps: Compare x4wk, x13wk, and x40wk to base_period_mean_returns_pct.
Use x4wksd, x13wksd, and x40wksd to estimate probability of exceeding base means.
Disclose stale or fallback data when is_stale=true or missing_reason is present.

tools.name: selections_latest
tools.title: Selections Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest st_select stock list ranked by prob13wk descending (probability of exceeding the 13-week base-period mean return of 2.19%, assuming normal distribution). No threshold filter applied. Use /selections/published/latest for the three-horizon published STIM Select definition. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: selections_history
tools.title: Selections History
tools.description: Returns historical st_select records. Filter by symbol_exchange, symbol, exchange, or date range. Each entry includes prob13wk. No threshold filter applied unless min_prob13wk is set. Use /selections/published/history for the three-horizon published definition. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: selections_published_latest

x4wk1.description: 4-week ST-IM lower CI bound must exceed base-period mean of 0%.

x13wk1.description: 13-week ST-IM lower CI bound must exceed base-period mean of 2.19%.

x40wk1.description: 40-week ST-IM lower CI bound must exceed base-period mean of 6.45%.

prob13wk.description: Probability of exceeding 13-week base-period mean must be at least 55%.

interpretation_rules: All four publication criteria must be satisfied simultaneously.
prob13wk >= 0.55 is the documented publication threshold.
Rank by prob13wk descending; higher prob13wk means stronger 13-week outperformance probability.
These are probabilistic candidates, not guaranteed outcomes — not investment advice.
Use /v1/stim/latest on individual symbols to see full distribution context.

tools.title: Published STIM Select Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest published STIM Select list filtered to the three-horizon published definition: x4wk1 > 0% (4-week lower CI bound), x13wk1 > 2.19% (13-week), x40wk1 > 6.45% (40-week), prob13wk >= 55% by default. Ranked by prob13wk descending. Includes full ST-IM distribution fields. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: selections_published_history

x4wk1.description: 4-week ST-IM lower CI bound must exceed base-period mean of 0%.

x13wk1.description: 13-week ST-IM lower CI bound must exceed base-period mean of 2.19%.

x40wk1.description: 40-week ST-IM lower CI bound must exceed base-period mean of 6.45%.

prob13wk.description: Probability of exceeding 13-week base-period mean must be at least 55%.

interpretation_rules: All four publication criteria must be satisfied simultaneously.
prob13wk >= 0.55 is the documented publication threshold.
Rank by prob13wk descending; higher prob13wk means stronger 13-week outperformance probability.
These are probabilistic candidates, not guaranteed outcomes — not investment advice.
Use /v1/stim/latest on individual symbols to see full distribution context.

tools.title: Published STIM Select History
tools.description: Returns historical published STIM Select records filtered to the three-horizon criteria and prob13wk threshold. Filter by symbol_exchange, symbol, exchange, or date range. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: stwr_reports_latest
tools.title: STWR Reports Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest Stock Trends Weekly Reporter screening report for a requested report code and exchange. Call /v1/stwr/reports/catalog to discover report codes before paying. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: stwr_reports_history
tools.title: STWR Reports History
tools.description: Returns historical Stock Trends Weekly Reporter screening report rows for a requested report code and exchange, grouped by weekdate by default. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: market_regime_latest

interpretation_rules: regime_score = bullish_pct minus bearish_pct across all active trend signals.
Do not use regime_score as a trade entry signal; use it as a portfolio bias input.
avg_rsi > 100 indicates the average universe security outperforms the S&P 500 benchmark.
avg_mt_cnt reveals whether the current regime is early-stage or mature.
Confirm with /v1/market/regime/history before acting on a single regime reading.
interpretation_guidance.downstream_workflow: Use regime result to set bias in /v1/agent/screener/top or /v1/portfolio/construct. Confirm with /v1/breadth/sector/latest and /v1/leadership/summary/latest.

tools.title: Market Regime Latest
tools.description: Returns the current market regime classification derived from the distribution of Stock Trends trend codes across all active signals. regime_score = bullish_pct minus bearish_pct. Bullish codes: ^+, ^-, v^. Bearish codes: v-, v+, ^v. Also returns avg_rsi (universe relative performance vs S&P 500, baseline 100) and avg_mt_cnt. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: market_regime_history

interpretation_rules: regime_score = bullish_pct minus bearish_pct across all active trend signals.
Do not use regime_score as a trade entry signal; use it as a portfolio bias input.
avg_rsi > 100 indicates the average universe security outperforms the S&P 500 benchmark.
avg_mt_cnt reveals whether the current regime is early-stage or mature.
Confirm with /v1/market/regime/history before acting on a single regime reading.
interpretation_guidance.downstream_workflow: Use regime result to set bias in /v1/agent/screener/top or /v1/portfolio/construct. Confirm with /v1/breadth/sector/latest and /v1/leadership/summary/latest.

tools.title: Market Regime History
tools.description: Returns a historical sequence of weekly market regime snapshots, most recent first, using the same classification logic as /market/regime/latest. Useful for regime transition analysis. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: market_regime_forecast
tools.title: Market Regime Forecast
tools.description: Returns a deterministic forward regime outlook derived from the direction and consistency of recent weekly regime scores. No ML. forecast_regime: bullish | bearish | mixed. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: evaluate_symbol
tools.title: Evaluate Symbol
tools.description: Evaluates a single symbol's trend context against the live market regime to produce a synthesized bias, confidence score, and decision_score (0-1). Fully deterministic — no ML. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: construct_portfolio
tools.title: Construct Portfolio
tools.description: Evaluates the full eligible universe of Stock Trends signal candidates and returns the top N by decision_score as an equal-weight portfolio. Fully deterministic — no ML. Primary ranking is decision_score DESC. Within tied decision_score tiers, ST-IM (Stock Trends Inference Model) risk-adjusted 13-week return (x13wk/x13wksd, winsorized and normalized to stim_percentile_13wk [0,1]) is used as a tiebreaker. Symbol is the final deterministic fallback. ranking_method='decision_score_stim_tiebreak' when ST-IM coverage is present; 'decision_score_only' when absent. Parameters: universe ('top' — directional trend candidates resolved from bias); count (integer 1–10, number of positions); bias ('auto' resolves from current regime, 'bullish' filters to bullish trend states ^+/^-/v^, 'bearish' filters to bearish trend states v-/v+/^v); exchange ('N' NYSE, 'Q' NASDAQ, 'A' AMEX, 'T' TSX — omitted defaults to US exchanges N/Q/A). Response includes decision_score, stim_percentile_13wk, stim_covered, portfolio_score, stim_weekdate, stim_covered_count, stim_coverage_pct, ranking_method, candidates_evaluated, candidate_selection_method, exchange_filter, bias_requested, bias_resolved, and regime_context. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

parameters.name: universe
parameters.description: Candidate universe. 'top' selects securities with directional Stock Trends trend classifications resolved from bias.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of equal-weight positions to return.

parameters.name: bias
parameters.description: Direction filter. 'auto' resolves from current regime. 'bullish' selects bullish trend states (^+, ^-, v^). 'bearish' selects bearish trend states (v-, v+, ^v). Mixed regime with 'auto' selects all directional trend states.

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Exchange filter. N=NYSE, Q=NASDAQ, A=AMEX, T=TSX. Omitted defaults to US exchanges N/Q/A.

tools.name: evaluate_portfolio
tools.title: Evaluate Portfolio
tools.description: Evaluates trend alignment, regime fit, and score distribution of a user-supplied portfolio against the current market regime. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: compare_portfolios
tools.title: Compare Portfolios
tools.description: Compares two user-supplied portfolios to quantify differences in score, alignment, and regime fit. Returns comparison.winner and comparison.score_delta. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: breadth_sector_latest
tools.title: Sector Breadth Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest sector breadth snapshot derived from Stock Trends signal distribution across sectors. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: breadth_sector_history
tools.title: Sector Breadth History
tools.description: Returns historical sector, industry-group, or industry breadth derived from Stock Trends signal distribution. Use for breadth transition analysis and workflow context. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: leadership_definitions
tools.title: Leadership Definitions
tools.description: Planning helper. Defines Stock Trends leadership screens, ranking fields, and taxonomy levels before paid leadership intelligence calls.

tools.name: leadership_summary_latest
tools.title: Leadership Summary Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest Stock Trends leadership summary identifying overall, sector, and industry-group leaders using relative performance and trend-alignment filters. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

tools.name: leadership_rotation_history
tools.title: Leadership Rotation History
tools.description: Returns historical sector leadership rotation over time with bullish share, average RSI, trend maturity, leadership_score, and weekly rank. Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current STC cost.
tools.pricing_note: STC is the source of truth; fetch /v1/pricing/catalog for current cost.

usage_guidance: Start with /v1/ai/tools as the primary machine-readable discovery entrypoint.
Call /v1/ai/proof/market-edge (no auth) to preview signal field structure before purchasing access.
Use /v1/ai/context for explanatory dataset context and endpoint group overviews.
Use /v1/workflows to choose a task-level strategy and endpoint sequence.
Use /v1/openapi.json to verify exact parameter locations before constructing calls.
Use /v1/instruments/lookup, /v1/instruments/resolve, /v1/stwr/reports/catalog, and /v1/meta/* endpoints as planning helpers before paid calls.
Fetch /v1/pricing/catalog at agent startup to resolve live STC costs — do not hardcode.
Use /v1/pricing to understand payment identity, agent identity, accepted headers, and supported rails.
For x402, inspect the HTTP 402 stocktrends_preview before payment to confirm purpose, inputs, response shape, pricing_rule_id, cost, rails, and related endpoints.
Use decision and portfolio endpoints for high-value actionable outputs.
Use market regime, breadth, and leadership endpoints for contextual enrichment.
Prefer structured API endpoints over scraping website pages.
